Behind the Wrench

MEET THE EXPERT

Musa
Automotive
Specialist

Master Mechanic · Mbale City, Uganda

With 14 years of hands-on experience, I am Mbale's most trusted specialist in car wiring, car diagnosis, ECU repair, fault tracing, and advanced automotive mechanics. Whether it's a complex electrical fault, engine misfire, or full car service — I find it and fix it fast. Every vehicle that enters my workshop leaves roadworthy and safe.

I also specialise in automotive accessories installation — car alarms, Android head units, music systems with woofers, GPS trackers, and central locks — all fitted with clean, professional wiring. Beyond repairs, I actively train and mentor students in car wiring and diagnosis, passing on 14 years of real-world automotive knowledge right here in Mbale City, Uganda.

What We Fix

OUR SERVICES

From a simple service to complex electrical faults — we handle it all with expertise and honesty.

🖥️

Car Diagnosis

Using advanced diagnostic tools to read error codes, identify root causes, and pinpoint issues fast — saving you time and money.

🛠️

Full Car Service

Comprehensive vehicle servicing — oil change, filters, fluids, belts, brakes — everything your car needs to run at its best.

💥

Misfires Clearing

Rough idle, engine misfires, and poor performance? We trace the exact cause and restore smooth power delivery to your engine.

🔬

ECU Repair & Reprogramming

Expert-level Electronic Control Unit (ECU) repair, board-level diagnosis, and reprogramming. We fix what others can't — the car's brain itself.

⚙️

General Mechanical Repair

From suspension to gearboxes, engines to clutches — no mechanical problem is too big or too small for our workshop.

💡

Light System Repair

Headlights, indicators, interior lighting, and full electrical light system diagnosis and repair. Night-safe driving guaranteed.

🔎

Fault Tracing / Shoot Tracing

Intermittent faults, hidden wiring problems, mysterious breakdowns — we hunt down every electrical gremlin with methodical precision.

🎵

Accessories Installation

Car alarms, music systems with woofers, Android head units, GPS trackers, central locks — professional fitting with clean, safe wiring.

🛒

Quality Spare Parts

We stock HAZARAT bulbs, sensors, fuel pumps, spark plugs, coils, alarms, music systems, trackers & more.

Mentorship & Training

Are you passionate about automotive repair? Musa actively trains and mentors aspiring mechanics — sharing real-world skills, wiring expertise, and trade secrets built over 14 years. Get in touch to learn more about training opportunities.

Peace of Mind, Guaranteed

WHY CHOOSE
MUSA AUTOMOTIVES?

We understand how stressful a car problem can be. That's why everything we do is built around one promise — your complete peace of mind. Hand us your keys, take a deep breath, and relax. Your car is in the safest hands in Mbale.

🛡️

"Every car that comes through our workshop is treated like it belongs to family. I stake my 14-year reputation on every single repair."

— Musa, Master Mechanic & Workshop Owner

🔍

Honest Diagnosis, Always

We tell you exactly what's wrong — nothing more, nothing less. No invented faults, no inflated bills. You'll always know what you're paying for and why.

⚡

Expert in Car Wiring

Wiring faults are where many mechanics give up. Not here. With 14 years specialising in automotive electrical systems, we solve what others simply can't.

⏱️

Fast Turnaround Time

We value your time. Most repairs are completed same-day or within 24 hours. We keep you updated throughout — no waiting in the dark.

💰

Fair & Transparent Pricing

We quote before we fix. No surprise charges when you come to collect. What we agree on upfront is exactly what you pay — full stop.

🔩

Quality Parts Only

We only fit parts we trust. Every spare part used in your repair is genuine quality — because cutting corners on parts just creates bigger problems later.

📞

Always Reachable

Car trouble doesn't keep office hours. Reach us on WhatsApp, Airtel or MTN — we're responsive and always ready to advise, even before you visit.

🏆

14 Years of Proven Trust

Over 7,000 successful repairs. A reputation built car by car, customer by customer — across Mbale City and beyond. We don't just fix cars; we earn loyalty.

🎓

Trained & Certified Knowledge

Musa doesn't just repair cars — he teaches mechanics. That level of deep knowledge and discipline flows into every job done in this workshop.

💬

Still Unsure?
Just Ask Us.

No pressure, no obligation. Send us a message describing your car problem and we'll advise you for free — because your trust matters more than a quick sale.

Ask on WhatsApp — Free
Simple. Transparent. Reliable.

HOW WE WORK

From the moment you contact us to the moment you drive away — here's exactly what happens. No mystery, no confusion. Just a smooth, professional process.

1
Contact Us

You Reach Out

Call, WhatsApp, or walk in. Tell us what's happening with your car. We respond fast — no long waits.

2
Inspection

We Listen & Inspect

We listen carefully to your description, then perform a thorough visual and electronic inspection of the vehicle.

3
Diagnosis

Full Diagnosis

Using professional diagnostic tools, we identify the exact root cause — not just the symptom. No guesswork, ever.

4
Quotation

Clear Quote Given

We explain what needs fixing and give you a clear, fair price. You approve before we touch anything. Always.

5
Ready!

Repair & Drive Away

We fix it right, test everything, and hand back your car in perfect condition. You drive away confident and safe.

1
Contact Us

You Reach Out

Call, WhatsApp, or walk in. Tell us what's happening with your car. We respond fast.

2
Inspection

We Listen & Inspect

We listen carefully, then perform a thorough visual and electronic inspection.

3
Diagnosis

Full Diagnosis

Using professional diagnostic tools, we find the exact root cause. No guesswork.

4
Quotation

Clear Quote Given

You receive a transparent price. You approve it before we start any work.

5
Done!

Repair & Drive Away

Fixed right, tested, handed back. You drive away safe and confident.

SPARE PARTS
